-- in --
package p

templ nestedWrapper(outer func() templ.Component, inner func() templ.Component) {
	<div class="outer">
		@outer()
		<div class="inner">
			@inner()
		</div>
	</div>
}

templ f() {
	@nestedWrapper(
		templ() {
			<span>first</span>
		},
		templ() {
			<span>second</span>
		},
	)
}
-- out --
package p

templ nestedWrapper(outer func() templ.Component, inner func() templ.Component) {
	<div class="outer">
		@outer()
		<div class="inner">
			@inner()
		</div>
	</div>
}

templ f() {
	@nestedWrapper(
		templ() {
			<span>first</span>
		},
		templ() {
			<span>second</span>
		},
	)
}
